name: whatsapp_send_text
description: Send a text message to a WhatsApp user from a registered WhatsApp Business sender number.

parameters.name: from
parameters.description: Registered WhatsApp sender number in E.164 format.

parameters.name: to
parameters.description: Recipient WhatsApp phone number in E.164 format.

parameters.name: content
parameters.description: Message content object with 'text' (string) field containing the message body.

parameters.name: messageId
parameters.description: Custom message ID for tracking. Auto-generated if not provided.

parameters.name: callbackData
parameters.description: Custom data to be included in delivery report webhook callbacks.

parameters.name: notifyUrl
parameters.description: Webhook URL to receive delivery reports for this message.

content.text: Hello! Your order #12345 has been shipped and will arrive by Friday.
